steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
Plug $x=-7$ into $f(x)=-4x+52$. This replaces the variable with the requested input from the question.
$f(-7)=-4(-7)+52$

steps.title: Compute the function value
steps.content: Multiply first, then add. $f(-7)=28+52=80$ The output is $80$, which matches the listed choice. The answer is A.
